sections.paragraph:
f. [“adj. f. foolish, Job 2:10 ”]-

(1) folly, and also its punishment. Job 42:8, לְבִלְתִּי עֲשֹׂות עִמָּכֶם נְבָלָה “lest I inflict on you the punishment of your folly;” comp. עָשָׂה חֶסֶד עִם Gen 24:49 47:29 .

(2) wickedness, 1Sa 25:25.

(3) shameful act of wickedness, as rape, incest, Jud. 19:23 , 24 Jdg 19:24 2Sa 13:12. A common phrase is עָֽשְׂתָה נְבָלָה בְיִשְׂרָאֵל, עָשָׂה Gen 34:7 Deu 22:21 Jud. 20:10 Jerem. 29:23 compare ע׳ זִמָּה וּנְבָלָה בְּיִשְׂרָאֵל Jud. 20:6 .
